title: cerastium mutabile var. triviale
intro: Cerastium mutabile var. triviale, also known as the variable chickweed or pink chickweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Cerastium mutabile var. triviale include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or topical cream, with the latter being used to treat skin conditions and wounds.
